task_name_empty: Whoops! Looks like you forgot to name your quest. Please give it a snazzy title.
task_description_empty: Uh-oh! We need some details to proceed. Please provide a compelling description.
invalid_priority: Oops! That priority level doesn't compute. Accepted values are: Urgent, High, Medium, Low. Give it another go!
stop_message: Session terminated. If you need to start over, just click the wand emoji or just say hi to re-engage the bot.
session_timeout: Time's up! Click the wand emoji or say hello to reawaken the bot and try again.
not_linked_message: Alert! Your Discord ID isn't linked to a ClickUp username. Please contact anyone from the Tech Tools team for assistance.
task_creation_failure: Yikes! Something went wrong while creating the task: {error}.
task_creation_success: Mission accomplished! Your task has been created. Here is your link: {task_url}
thank_you: Thank you for riding with Tech Tools Express! Until next time, stay techy!
cooldown_message: Cool down in progress. Please wait {minutes} minutes and {seconds} seconds before rebooting your request.
cooldown_end: Cool down complete! You can now activate the bot again.
active_session: Hold up! You already have an active session. Please finish it before launching a new one.
invalid_priority_error: Whoops! That priority level doesn't compute. Accepted values are: urgent, high, medium, low.
